subject: [PATCH 1/2] nfs: fix utimensat() for atime with delegated timestamps

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Posted an initial patch to fix a bug in the NFS client where delegated timestamps don't properly update the ctime when only atime is updated through utimensat().

2026-03-05.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS client where delegated timestamps don't properly update the ctime when only atime is updated through utimensat(). The fix involves changing the client to issue an RPC to update the ctime alongside the atime.
